Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden side table with two tiers; ornate curved legs, a lower shelf holding a woven basket, and small decorative objects on the top surface are visible; appears scuffed and medium-sized, roughly 1.2 meters from the camera.

Three-seat dark brown leather couch with padded, stitched cushions and a tufted back; visible reclining seams and wide padded armrests; mostly visible in the crop with a slight left-edge cut-off; appears to be approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

Partial close-up of a white-faced circular wall clock showing black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands, silver-ish rim with visible glare and edge cropping at lower-left; image is slightly blurred/low-resolution and the clock appears roughly 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden side table with a glossy finish; visible rectangular top and a small central drawer with a brass knob, tabletop holds cropped items; appears bedside-sized and photographed at approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

Cream/white pleated fabric shade sitting on a faceted clear glass column base with a metallic socket/rim; lamp appears unlit and the bottom is slightly cropped by the image edge, approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Dark brown leather recliner-style couch shown in a left-edge crop; visible padded back cushion, prominent armrest and a reclining lever on the side with worn creased upholstery and stitching details — partial/cropped view, photographed at approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

Close-up view (approx. 1.0 m) of a dark brown leather recliner shown in left-side profile; the crop is partial/edge-cropped and includes the padded armrest, sagging seat cushion, creased/wrinkled leather surface and a visible reclining lever on the side. Backrest shows horizontal seam lines and the leather appears worn with surface wrinkles and soft cushioning; chair is angled slightly away from the camera.

Partial close-up of a dark-gray painted fireplace surround with a recessed rectangular firebox opening; interior appears empty and black, surround shows painted texture with slight wear, mantel edge and small objects visible at top-left, and the crop is edge-cut at lower-left. Approximate camera distance ~1.5 m.

White painted wooden mantel and surround with rectangular black firebox opening and raised-panel molding; mantel shelf holds small objects and the lower opening is dark/unlit, partially occluded by a low table and chair in the foreground, mostly intact and edge-visible — approximately 1.5 m from camera.

Partial left-edge crop of a stainless-steel double-door refrigerator with vertical dark handles, a reflective finish showing window-blind reflections, and visible denting/warping near the handle area; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m) and is partially cut off by the image edge.

Partial view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and simple raised molding; vertical orientation with a satin-to-slightly-gloss finish, left edge partially obscured by a bright object and the crop cuts the cabinet edges, no visible hardware; occupies most of the crop and appears fairly close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).

Tall, narrow dark reddish-brown wooden recessed-panel cabinet door shown in a vertical crop; matte finish with a rectangular inner panel, minor scuffs and small chip at the top-left, edges slightly cropped — appears photographed close (≈1.0 m from camera).

Partial, edge-cropped white rectangular oven front panel with a flat metal-like surface and two dark lower openings; the object appears slightly blurred/low-resolution and weathered, visible at approximately 3.0 meters from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark-stained wooden cabinet back showing vertical recessed rectangular panels and a semi-gloss finish with slight wear at panel edges; only the upper/mid section is visible and appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Pair of tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet doors with recessed rectangular panels and a vertical seam between them; smooth medium-gloss finish with a soft highlight near the upper center, no visible handles, and the lower edge is slightly cut off by the crop; appears to be close to the camera (around 0.8 m).

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and narrow stiles, vertical orientation and a smooth semi-gloss finish with faint reflections; the door is mostly visible but its left edge is close to the crop border (slightly edge-cropped); estimated distance ~1.2 m from camera.

Glossy black plastic coffee maker with a vertical silver/metal control panel and visible buttons on the right, a rectangular water/reservoir window near the top; partially cropped at the image edge and appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).

Narrow, low-pile brown-orange rectangular rug or runner with a flatwoven, wood-grain-like linear pattern and darker longitudinal bands; visible area is edge-cropped (partial) and shows slight wear/scuffing; appears close to the camera at roughly 0.5 m distance.

Dark brown wooden cabinet front showing two recessed rectangular panel doors with a semi-gloss finish and visible wood grain; right side is partially cropped and occluded by a lamp edge, lower edge and baseboard visible, appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).

Partial dark brown/black wooden cabinet front with a recessed rectangular panel and narrow frame, shown in an edge-cropped close-up view (approximately 0.5 m from camera); lower-right area is occluded by a green object.

Partial, edge-cropped stainless steel sink basin with a shiny reflective metallic finish and visible rounded rim and light surface scratches; a narrow strip of brown countertop is visible at the bottom — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).

Partial, edge-cropped view of the upper front of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet showing a horizontal decorative molding and a recessed panel with a glossy finish and minor surface wear; appears close to the camera, approximately 1.0 m away.

Partial, edge-cropped dark stained wooden cabinet door showing a recessed rectangular center panel with a matte finish and minor surface wear; no visible hardware; appears to be a standard vertical cabinet door approximately 0.6–1.0 m away (≈0.8 m).

Partial close-up of a dark brown stained wood cabinet side with recessed rectangular panels and a lighter unfinished plywood top edge visible at the top; the surface shows scuffs and a semi-gloss finish, edge-cropped in the frame and photographed from roughly 0.8 meters away.

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a raised-panel design and visible wood grain, occupying most of the crop and cut off at the left and top edges; a partial round knob is visible at the left edge—appears to be an upper kitchen/wardrobe cabinet approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial close-up of a brass-colored curved faucet spout visible at the left edge of the crop; metallic surface shows warm patina and small highlights, edge-cropped and photographed from a short distance (approx. 0.5 m).

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet door with visible wood grain and a vertical recessed panel; appears wall-mounted and photographed at close range (approx. 0.6 m), with a small metallic appliance visible in the lower-left foreground.

Edge-cropped close view of a stainless-steel double-basin kitchen sink with visible rim and partition, reflective scratched metal finish and light water marks; both basins are partially visible and the faucet is out of frame, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial, close (≈0.6 m) view of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple molded frame; matte finish with light scuffs near the bottom and no visible handle, crop is edge-cut at left and bottom.

Brushed stainless-steel oven door with a horizontal tubular handle across the upper third, warm brownish reflections and vertical brushed texture; image is slightly blurred/low-resolution and the appliance fills the crop at an estimated distance of about 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial top-edge view of a stainless steel sink basin showing the curved chrome lip and a small portion of the basin set into a beige/cream countertop; reflective metal surface with light scratches and water marks, crop is edge-cut and close-up (estimated distance ~0.6 m).
Partial edge crop of a dark brown wooden cabinet door showing two vertical recessed panels, visible wood grain and minor scuffs; close-up view approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark reddish-brown mahogany wooden chair back with ornate carved scrollwork and circular cutouts, glossy polished finish; lower seat and front legs are partially visible and the object is edge-cropped on the sides — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden dining chair with a tall carved back and a light/beige upholstered seat; turned front legs and a visible stretcher, medium-worn finish, photographed at close range (~1.2 m).

Close-up of a partial dark varnished wooden chair back showing vertical slats and a curved top rail; glossy finish with lighter highlight streaks, edge-cropped in the frame, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden rectangular dining table with a polished surface, partially occluded at the front by an ornate carved chair back and with chairs tucked underneath; table edges and lower legs are cropped by the image, suggesting a close viewpoint of about 1.2 m from the camera.

Dark stained wooden dining chair with carved vertical back slats and a beige upholstered cushioned seat, curved wooden armrest visible; the chair is partially edge-cropped in the image and appears approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

White-painted arched-top window with horizontal slatted blinds covering the semicircular transom and rectangular lower sash; blinds are mostly closed with narrow gaps revealing a blurred outdoor view, glass shows streaks/dirt and the lower-right area is slightly occluded by an interior object — appears roughly 2–4 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and simple raised molding; vertical orientation with a satin-to-slightly-gloss finish, left edge partially obscured by a bright object and the crop cuts the cabinet edges, no visible hardware; occupies most of the crop and appears fairly close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).
